why_this_action.summary: The loop had just shipped fresh high-intent submissions to Claude Code Alternatives and Claude Stack, but the backlink tracker could not see or age those lanes yet. Expanding the tracker was the highest-leverage move available during the active measurement-hold window because it turns today's real distribution work into measurable follow-through instead of another fake reset.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg is still flat and remains the primary success gate
distribution_lane_latest.json: active lane is measurement_hold, so the next move should be follow-through rather than another burst
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: same-family directory and curator overlap are live constraints
market_intelligence_latest.json: Claude-adjacent comparison surfaces are the right audience
outreach-log.md: Claude Code Alternatives and Claude Stack were freshly submitted today

expected_outcome: Future measurement-hold and review runs can now verify whether today's highest-intent Claude ecosystem submissions go live, instead of treating them as opaque pending work.
